lessonTitle: Recap Module 7: Development of Impactful Strategic Work Plans

slides.title: Recap: Development of Impactful Strategic Work Plans

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? The community you serve is a stakeholder.
data.feedback_correct: True! The community you serve is always a stakeholder in your work plan cycle.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? One key part of a concept note is the problem you are trying to address.
data.feedback_correct: True! The background section of a concept note describes the problem you are trying to address.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? The rationale includes what is being achieved.
data.feedback_correct: False! The rationale describes HOW you will carry out the work. What is being achieved is described in the Objective section.

data.question: What is work plan implementation?
options: The detailed work plan outlines the process from concept to execution, enabling users to understand the project's success measurement.
Executing the work plan is vital for achieving desired outcomes and communicating success to stakeholders. Monitoring ensures goals are met.

Monitoring project progress is crucial. As the project nears completion, prepare to present a comprehensive evaluation to stakeholders. Highlight achievements and outline steps for future projects to sustain and build upon this work.
data.correct_answer: Executing the work plan is vital for achieving desired outcomes and communicating success to stakeholders. Monitoring ensures goals are met.
data.feedback_correct: Work plan implementation is executing the plan. It is vital for achieving desired outcomes and communicating success to stakeholders, with monitoring ensuring goals are met.

data.question: What is the work plan cycle in order?
options: Concept note, work plan development, implementation, evaluation
Concept note, evaluation, work plan development, implementation
Recruitment, concept note, work plan development, implementation, evaluation
Concept note, work plan development, implementation
data.correct_answer: Concept note, work plan development, implementation, evaluation
data.feedback_correct: The correct order is: Concept Note, Work Plan Development, Implementation, then Evaluation.

data.question: What should be worked on after the concept note has been approved?
data.feedback_correct: After the concept note is approved by stakeholders, you move on to developing the full work plan.

data.question: What is the difference between a concept note and a work plan?
options: A concept note is for getting stakeholders while a work plan is how this will be achieved
A work plan is for getting stakeholders while a concept note is how this will be achieved
data.correct_answer: A concept note is for getting stakeholders while a work plan is how this will be achieved
data.feedback_correct: The concept note is used to gain stakeholder agreement on a project idea. The work plan is the detailed roadmap for how you will achieve it.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? Less documentation means your organization will be stronger.
data.feedback_correct: False! More documentation means your organization will be stronger. Documentation supports accountability, communication, knowledge management, and compliance.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? Success can only be measured through a survey.
data.feedback_correct: False! Success can be measured in many different ways — surveys, participation data, interviews, policy changes, health outcomes, and many other methods.

data.question: What is most important?
options: Having a budget, timeline and ensuring success
Making the most amount of money possible
Getting your project out as soon as possible
data.correct_answer: Having a budget, timeline and ensuring success
data.feedback_correct: Having a realistic budget, a feasible timeline, and a plan for ensuring success are the most important elements of project planning.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? The logical framework does not help see ways to measure success.
data.feedback_correct: False! One of the main benefits of a logical framework is that it helps you identify ways to measure success at each level.

data.question: What are some of the parts of a logical framework?
options: Only looks at the amount of participants and trainees
This is where you decide the reason of the activity
data.feedback_correct: A logical framework includes: Inputs, Activities, Outputs, Outcomes, and Impact.

data.question: Why is documenting important?
options: Helps to ensure accountability, betters communication and collaboration, legal reasons
It is only needed for donors to see success
data.correct_answer: Helps to ensure accountability, betters communication and collaboration, legal reasons
data.feedback_correct: Documentation is important for accountability, enhancing communication and collaboration, knowledge management for future projects, and compliance and legal requirements.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? Do not allow for scope creep.
What does the 'A' in SMART-IE means?
data.feedback_correct: The 'A' in SMART-IE stands for Achievable — the objective should match the capacity of your organization.

data.question: Is the following statement true or false? When working on work plan, expand the rationale.
data.feedback_correct: True! When transitioning from a concept note to a work plan, you should expand the rationale into a full implementation plan with detailed activities, timelines, and responsibilities.
